productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kid's Delhi Daredevils Match Blue Cap
description: Composition:Blue cap made of Clima Cool material with a comfort Fit for kids, breathable mesh on sides with white stripes along the shade and adjustable strap at the backWash care:HandwashSmart and stylish, this cap from adidas is specially designed for those little cricket fans. In bright blue, the white stripes along the shade and red mesh along the sides add to the smart look. The mesh, coupled with the polyester material of the cap ensures it keeps the little heads dry and well ventilated as they enjoy a wondrous game of cricket with the Delhi Daredevils this season.
